name: Eye mask
description: A soothing eye mask infused with the calming, dreamy scent of the beloved Sleepy range — lavender and tonka bean — designed to help you drift off into a restful slumber.
archive_note: The Sleepy eye mask is a Kitchen and exclusive product designed as part of the broader Sleepy sleep range
nostalgia_angle: Part of Lush's beloved Sleepy range, a fan-favourite sleep-aid collection that has built a devoted following since its launch
throwback_reference: Companion product to the iconic Sleepy body lotion and Twilight bath bomb, extending the lavender-tonka sleep ritual
